headline: Gas Mixtures Market Poised for Strong Growth with Semiconductor and Emission Standards Driving Demand
summary: The gas mixtures market is forecasted to grow from USD 28.70 billion in 2025 to USD 35.04 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 4.1%. Key growth drivers include expanding semiconductor production, stringent emissions standards, and increased demand for precise industrial processes. The argon mixtures segment, ideal for welding and constructed with other gases, ranks as the second-largest. The food & beverages sector reflects strong growth, with gas mixtures extending food shelf life. Asia Pacific emer
